case_title: EVELING CALDERON VS. ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EVELING CALDERON WITH ASSISTANCE FROM COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES' REPRESENTATIVE ROBERT SAKOGAWA. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CALDERON, EVELING ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES

ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR DECEMBER 12, 2016 AT 3:30. CONTINUED TRIAL - PLAINTIFF WAS TOLD TO GO TO THE ACCESS CENTER TO IDENTIFY THE PROPER DEFENDANT AND AMEND HER COMPLAINT ACCORDINGLY. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF CLAIM TO INCLUDE DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, EVELING
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-05-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-24-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF EVELING CALDERON (8:54 AM) & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ROBERT SAKOGAWA, RISK SPECIALIST FOR ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CALDERON, EVELING AS TO DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES EAN HOLDINGS LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, EVELING AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-14-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON, EVELING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC $2,519.98 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,629.98, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, EVELING

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CALDERON, EVELING AS TO DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDERON, EVELING AS TO DEFENDANT ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES

APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES AND EAN HOLDINGS LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE ROBERT SAKOGAWA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ELCO ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
